title: PM Schema V2 UI Cross-Surface Integration Test Surface And Validation Harness
objective: Implement the smallest bounded cross-surface integration test surface and validation harness that exercises the full governed field-to-lead-to-PM seam path in one place, proving end-to-end chained behavior, shared read models, authority boundaries, and regression stability across the three validated role surfaces without implementing Gantt visualization, Supabase migration, Class D behavior, billing finalization, or direct client writes for controlled operational state.
constrained_outputs: One working cross-surface integration test surface or dashboard that can drive and observe the bounded field-to-lead-to-PM chain against the mutation seam
One working validation harness or scripted path proving shared regression checks across the three role surfaces
One execution handoff documenting chained scenarios exercised, authority and precondition gates preserved, and validation results
No implementation beyond the bounded integration test surface and the seam/frontend modules it directly requires
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-001d implements only the bounded cross-surface integration test surface and validation harness it directly requires
Confirm all controlled writes continue to route through the mutation seam rather than direct client writes
Confirm the harness proves chained field-to-lead-to-PM scenarios and preserves authority, offline, idempotency, and blocking-issue rules
Confirm no Gantt implementation, Supabase migration, Class D behavior, billing finalization, or broad production-hardening is implemented by convenience
sql_permission_note: Packet UI-001d authorizes only the bounded cross-surface integration test surface and validation harness. It does not authorize Gantt implementation, Supabase migration, direct client writes, Class D finance behavior, or billing finalization design.
